questions.question: What is the primary role of a register file in a CPU?
options: To store frequently used instructions for faster access
To hold temporary data during I/O operations
To store general-purpose registers that are directly accessible by instructions for data manipulation
To manage the hierarchy and coherence of cache memory
To convert analog signals from peripheral devices into digital data

questions.question: In the context of chip manufacturing, what fundamental process does 'photolithography' primarily describe?
options: The process of electrically testing the silicon wafer for defects
The technique used to deposit thin layers of various materials onto the wafer surface
The method of etching away unwanted material from the wafer after patterning
The process of using light to transfer geometric patterns from a photomask onto a photosensitive material on the wafer
The final assembly and packaging of the silicon die into a functional chip

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a 'Guard Band' in analog mixed-signal Integrated Circuit (IC) layout?
options: To provide a safety margin against voltage overshoots in digital circuits
To physically protect sensitive analog circuits from electromagnetic interference (EMI) originating from adjacent digital blocks
To regulate the on-chip temperature distribution for improved performance
To prevent electrostatic discharge (ESD) events from damaging internal circuitry
To ensure proper power supply sequencing during chip startup

questions.question: In the design of a highly pipelined processor, what type of hazard does a 'structural hazard' primarily represent?
options: When an instruction requires data that has not yet been produced by a prior instruction in the pipeline
When a branch instruction alters the program flow, causing instructions fetched down the wrong path to be flushed
When two or more instructions simultaneously require the same physical hardware resource, leading to a conflict
When the instruction fetched from memory is corrupted or invalid
When the latency of memory access operations significantly delays pipeline progress

questions.question: What is the main function of an 'endianness' convention (e.g., Big-Endian, Little-Endian) in computer architecture?
options: To define the order in which arithmetic operations are performed by the ALU
To specify the direction of data transfer across the system bus
To determine the bit-width of various data types (e.g., integer, float) in memory
To dictate the byte order in which multi-byte data (such as integers or addresses) are stored and retrieved from memory
To manage the priority levels of different interrupt requests from I/O devices
